title: Keto Pecorino Crispy Salad
description: A refreshing keto salad featuring crispy pecorino and mixed greens.

ingredients.name: Crunchy Salad Topping (e.g. crispy bacon, chopped nuts)

instructions: Rinse and dry the mixed greens.
Crumble the pecorino cheese into small pieces and toast in the oven at 350°F (175°C) for 5 minutes, or until crispy.
In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens and crispy pecorino cheese.
Drizzle the peppery olive oil over the salad and sprinkle with crunchy salad topping.
Toss to combine and serve immediately.
